name: Mina, You Changed Your Profile Picture Again
overview:
The humorous and realistic tale of Mina, a 29-year-old single woman questioning the direction of her life.

As her friends settle down in marriage and she navigates through failed relationships in her twenties, Mina finds herself frequently switching between boyfriends and profile pictures. Will she rediscover the capacity to love?

trailers.title: 미나씨 또 프사 바뀌었네요 | 메인 예고편 | 왓챠 오리지널 | 2월 7일 공개!
